title: Senior Plant Manager at Prince Pipes

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Prince Pipes
jsonLd.description:
Prince Pipes has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Prince Pipes:
Prince Pipes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes!
